evals.name: stig-synthetic-fixtures
evals.prompt: Run a security assessment on the synthetic STIG vulnerability fixtures
evals.expected_output: Should detect: weak crypto (MD5, DES, RC4, Blowfish, ECB mode), SSRF patterns, XXE, insecure deserialization (pickle, yaml.load), missing audit logging, PII in logs, command injection (child_process.exec), NoSQL injection, path traversal, IDOR, missing auth, prototype pollution, insecure cookies. Should map findings to OWASP categories and ideally STIG V-numbers.

evals.name: api-express-app
evals.prompt: Scan my Express API for security vulnerabilities
evals.expected_output: Should find real-world issues in a production Express 5.x + Prisma + JWT app. Expect findings around JWT config, CORS, error handling, auth patterns. Report should be actionable with clear remediation.

evals.name: mastra-workflow-engine
evals.prompt: Run a security assessment on the Mastra workflow engine
evals.expected_output: Should find issues in Drizzle ORM + PGBoss + Express app. Expect dependency findings, config issues, potential injection patterns. Report should handle a larger codebase without errors.
